subject: [CLI] Update port value
commit_message:
[CLI] Update port value

Port is updated according to CLI dockerfile

Issue-ID: CLI-466

Signed-off-by: sharath reddy <bs.reddy@huawei.com>
Change-Id: I47da169add19570725d0a426ffcec338c8d6ff38
Signed-off-by: sharath reddy <bs.reddy@huawei.com>

entries.message:

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab Azure AKS 4: Chained-CI build started (pipeline id: 579315650), max time: 24400 seconds

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

How does this resolve the issue? Has this been tested locally?
Commit message is also invalid.
Should be in the form of:
[CLI] Update port value

Reason for updating port value blah..

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/5461/ )

It seems that you don"t have a commit body.

You must add at least one sentence explaining the purpose of the commit ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/5461/ )

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The line in commit is too long: it has a size of 136 instead of 80 characters maximum.
